decision: The exact canonical Jarvis RAF213G project constitution is present on the current main branch of rafsof22-lgtm/jarvis-build and is the controlling project constitution.

supersedes.reason: That state was accurate before the canonical file was committed and connected. Current merged GitHub truth now proves the exact file.

historical_candidate_policy: JARVIS_RAF213G_PROJECT_CONSTITUTION_RECOVERED_CANDIDATE.md remains historical recovery evidence and does not replace or amend the canonical GitHub file.
applicability: All material Jarvis work in the connected project and repository.
required_startup_order: applicable module-local instructions, deployment ledger and rollback
current issue, branch, pull request, CI and runtime evidence
rollback: Revert this DecisionRecord only if the canonical file is removed or proven invalid by a later owner-approved constitutional amendment. Preserve this record in Git history.
residual_risk: Unconnected chats cannot automatically read repository files. They must retrieve the canonical path before material work.
